The tape should be parallel of the neck crosssection. One finger in the tape, It is advisable to slightly tight(Add 2cm is the finished collar size). ","imgUrl":"/mtmstorage/images/netSizeMeasure/netbookImages/1688352089704.jpg","videoUrl":"https://mtm-platform.oss-cn-hangzhou.aliyuncs.com/MTM/NETSIZE/BOOK/LREBD.mp4","dtls":null},{"id":2,"bookId":1,"field":"LREBW","desc":"Chest","text":"Run the measuring tape around the fullest part of the chest. Two fingers in the measuring tape, not too tight or too loose. ","imgUrl":"/mtmstorage/images/netSizeMeasure/netbookImages/1688352092647.jpg","videoUrl":"https://mtm-platform.oss-cn-hangzhou.aliyuncs.com/MTM/NETSIZE/BOOK/LREBW.mp4","dtls":null},{"id":3,"bookId":1,"field":"LRELB","desc":"Stomach","text":"Take the back waist point as the datum point, run the measuring tape around the abdomen. Two fingers in the measuring tape, not too tight or too loose. ","imgUrl":"/mtmstorage/images/netSizeMeasure/netbookImages/1688352093329.jpg","videoUrl":"https://mtm-platform.oss-cn-hangzhou.aliyuncs.com/MTM/NETSIZE/BOOK/LRELB.mp4","dtls":null},{"id":4,"bookId":1,"field":"LREFW","desc":"Belly","text":"Measure horizontally around the highest part of the belly. suggest two fingers' space , not loose or tight.only for those with larger stomach size than the chest. ","imgUrl":"/mtmstorage/images/netSizeMeasure/netbookImages/1688352093573.jpg","videoUrl":"https://mtm-platform.oss-cn-hangzhou.aliyuncs.com/MTM/NETSIZE/BOOK/LREFW.mp4","dtls":null},{"id":5,"bookId":1,"field":"LREST","desc":"Seat","text":"Stand naturally and measure around the fullest part of the hips.
